items.title: 230928 -  Stable Release
items.body:
Installer is updated to require stable releases of each plugin. For development purposes, a devcontainer also is embedded into this install. 

## What's Changed
* Created a dependency checker by @sebastianthulin in https://github.com/municipio-se/municipio-deployment/pull/6
* Efficient build  by @sebastianthulin in https://github.com/municipio-se/municipio-deployment/pull/7
* Update versions to latests for helsingborg-stad packages by @Sven65 in https://github.com/municipio-se/municipio-deployment/pull/9
* feat: add devcontainer files by @thorbrink in https://github.com/municipio-se/municipio-deployment/pull/8

## New Contributors
* @sebastianthulin made their first contribution in https://github.com/municipio-se/municipio-deployment/pull/6
* @Sven65 made their first contribution in https://github.com/municipio-se/municipio-deployment/pull/9
* @thorbrink made their first contribution in https://github.com/municipio-se/municipio-deployment/pull/8

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/municipio-se/municipio-deployment/compare/3.2.4...3.3.0

items.title: Maintenance version 3.2.4
items.body:
This release includes an update for litespeed common settings and a real nonce field for the active directory integration, to accomodate the requirement of ESI cache bypassing. 

Litespeed needs to include _ad_nonce as a nonce esi include.

This release is a patch, including project manager integration to allow users to build innovation plugins.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/municipio-se/municipio-deployment/compare/3.2.0...3.2.1

items.title: Release 3.2.0
items.body:
## Release Notes - 3.2.0

- Algolia search now supports searching for custom taxonomies/terms.
- Herovideo now supports the "poster" attribute.
- Added padding/margin to headers in the post module.
- Improved visibility of the current page in the side navigation.
- Tags are now compressed for optimized performance.
- The heart icon now properly appears above the filtering list.
- OpenStreetMap has undergone accessibility testing.

Bug Fixes:

- The module now displays an appropriate icon in the module list.
- Modified the message displayed when submitting an email address.
- Empty required fields now validate correctly in general forms.
- Added ListID for proper functionality.
- Improved translation accuracy for the add-on.
- Resolved the issue of oversized sliders on culture websites.
- Enhanced the display of posts in the "Right Sidebar" on term pages.
- Added hover effect for improved appearance of quick links row.
- Removed manual input of link in linked card content.
- Randomized the order of sidebar visits on archive pages.
- Updated URL to reflect changes when new states are pushed on the map.
- Removed title translation in place, improving translation.

Adds a parameter in the deployment process allowing a custom port number to deploy towards. A new secret must be defined for all deployment flows according to the following: 

DEPLOY_REMOTE_PORT_STAGE (use port 22 if in doubt)
DEPLOY_REMOTE_PORT_PROD (use port 22 if in doubt)

items.title: Maintenance version 3.0.1
items.body:
2023-01-05

General patches of bugs and improvements of usability. Some of the new key features are: 

- Support for dropdown menus in primary menu (Municipio).
- Support for captions in uploaded videos (Modularity).
- Aside tags for all modules in sidebars.
- Better (automatic fetching) cover-art support for vimeo and youtube videos. 
- In content-images are now being rendered as a component. 
- HTML markup in event pages improved. 
- Gallery component improvement.
